description_long: This object is a detailed sushi platter featuring a wooden serving board with an assortment of sushi pieces arranged in neat rows. On the left, there are four rectangular maki rolls with white rice and colorful fillings, wrapped in seaweed. In the center, there are four cylindrical maki rolls with green seaweed exteriors and visible rice and filling. To the right, there are four pieces of salmon nigiri, each with a slice of orange fish atop a block of rice, and a small blue rectangular dish containing dark soy sauce. Two pairs of black chopsticks with white tips are placed beside the board. The platter also includes small portions of green wasabi and pink pickled ginger as garnishes.
description: A wooden sushi platter with assorted maki rolls, salmon nigiri, a soy sauce dish, chopsticks, and garnishes of wasabi and pickled ginger.
description_view_0: The sushi platter is seen from the side, showing all sushi types, the soy sauce dish, and both pairs of chopsticks.
description_view_1: A top-down view highlights the arrangement of sushi, garnishes, and the soy sauce dish at the front.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the maki rolls and nigiri, with the soy sauce dish and garnishes more visible.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the backs of the maki rolls and the wooden board, with chopsticks on either side.
